overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk nightclub in a video game. The player walks through a neon-lit bar and lounge area, enters a purple-lit restroom, and returns through back corridors. The environment features futuristic industrial architecture with heavy use of green and purple neon lighting.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a crowded cyberpunk bar with green neon lighting. The camera moves along the yellow-lit bar counter where patrons sit on purple stools, with glass bottle shelves behind. The space gradually opens toward a lounge area with a large circular chandelier visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale lounge with DJ booth and circular chandelier

enters corridor leading to restroom area

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open lounge area featuring a prominent circular chandelier and DJ booth. The camera passes by a back bar counter and approaches a blue neon-lit doorway. Large windows reveal the city outside while the space opens up from the narrow bar to a wider social area.

segments.scene_description: Inside a futuristic restroom illuminated by purple neon lights. The camera pans across white sinks and toilet stalls. A person in a red outfit stands at the counter looking at their phone. The space is narrow with metallic walls and purple ambient lighting creating a distinct atmosphere from the main club.

events.description: lighting returns to green neon when exiting restroom
exits restroom back into the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through back corridors toward the main club exit

notable_agents.action: two people walking toward the restroom

entered.detail: doorway framed with blue neon lights marking the restroom entrance
illuminated vending machines against the wall
wall covered in graffiti and street art
potted plants lining the corridor

segments.scene_description: Walking through narrow back corridors with green neon lighting, passing vending machines and graffiti-covered walls. Two people walk toward the camera heading to the restroom. The camera approaches the exit back to the main club area, with the blue neon doorway arch visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant cyberpunk nightclub that shifts from a crowded social hub into a sterile restroom and finally through industrial back corridors. It begins by gliding past a yellow-lit bar counter and patrons on purple stools under green neon lights, before the space opens up into a wide lounge featuring a prominent circular chandelier and a DJ booth. As the camera passes a back bar and glimpses the city through large windows, it transitions through a blue neon doorway into a narrow, purple-lit restroom filled with white sinks and metallic walls. The scene then shifts back into the service areas, moving through cramped corridors lined with vending machines and graffiti under green lighting. Finally, the camera passes two oncoming patrons while heading toward the blue neon arch that leads back to the main club.
